positive: A vibrant, maximalist illustration of a celestial fox curled around a crescent moon, set against a deep midnight blue and indigo gradient background. The fox features intricate, stylized watercolor details with glowing gold accents, emanating soft light. The composition is highly centralized and symmetrical, creating a strong silhouette effect. Elements include stylized constellations, nebulae wisps, and geometric mandalas subtly integrated into the background pattern. Art style: Neo-Japanese Ukiyo-e meets Bohemian Mysticism. Composition: Perfect circular crop, centered subject. Lighting: High contrast, ethereal glow from the fox and moon, cinematic rim lighting. Color Palette: Deep blues, vibrant magentas, electric turquoise, antique gold. Print quality: Clean vector lines, crisp edges, flat graphic areas suitable for screen printing.
negative: low resolution, bad anatomy, blurred, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, extra limbs, noisy, dirty, grayscale, monochrome, bokeh, jpeg artifacts, blurry edges
